summary: Iteration 15 - P2 Features Testing Complete. All 17 backend tests passed (100% success rate). Verified: Trainer Dashboard with 6 batches, attendance APIs, course completion API, Payment model now includes student_name and program_name, public certificate request endpoints accessible.

Trainer batches auto-created with 6 fixed time slots when trainer user is registered
Attendance APIs (line 4190-4278) correctly restrict access to trainers only
Course Completion API (line 4389-4442) correctly validates trainer assignment before marking completion
Public certificate request endpoints (line 5542-5632) accessible without authentication
